description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features large rectangular windows and a central entryway, flanked by manicured hedges and a paved walkway. The house is surrounded by a landscaped yard with various trees and shrubs, and a driveway runs along one side. The roof appears to have open sections, possibly for rooftop access or terraces, and the window arrangement is regular and evenly spaced. The exterior is primarily composed of red brick with white window frames and trim, giving it a classic, understated appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Modern influences, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A two-story red brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees, hedges, and a driveway. The facade is classic and orderly, with a central entryway and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, hedges, and a paved walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain brick wall, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a back door, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side yard, and more trees, with the flat roof and open sections visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, flanked by large windows, accessed via a paved walkway and bordered by hedges.
